creator: kris@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, 14 Apr 2000 dennisjun@yahoo.com wrote:

> Basically the ssh2 and tcsh ports won't make install. I did a cvsup of
> the ports about 2 days ago and those 2 ports seem to be broken.

You probably caught us in the middle of a transition - the ssh2 port was
known to be broken, and is now fixed, and the tcsh port installs fine on
my machine. Can you verify this is the case for you?

Kris

In God we Trust -- all others must submit an X.509 certificate.
    -- Charles Forsythe <forsythe@alum.mit.edu>
